 Applies Point Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS. More...
 

Detailed Description

Provides methods for applying boundary conditions in 2D/3D FEM.

This class includes static methods for applying:

  • Dirichlet boundary condition
  • Point Dirichlet condition

Definition at line 1232 of file ArcaneFemFunctions.h.

Member Function Documentation

◆ applyDirichletToLhsAndRhs()

static void ArcaneFemFunctions::BoundaryConditions::applyDirichletToLhsAndRhs ( BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition *  bs,
const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView &  node_dof,
DoFLinearSystem &  m_linear_system,
VariableDoFReal &  rhs_values 
)
inlinestatic

Applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS and LHS.

Updates the LHS matrix and RHS vector to enforce Dirichlet conditions.

  • For LHS matrix 𝐀, the diagonal term for the Dirichlet DOF is set to 𝑃.
  • For RHS vector 𝐛, the Dirichlet DOF term is scaled by 𝑃.
Parameters
bsBoundary condition values.
node_dofDOF connectivity view.
node_coordNode coordinates.
m_linear_systemLinear system for LHS.
rhs_valuesRHS values to update.

Definition at line 1252 of file ArcaneFemFunctions.h.

◆ applyDirichletToRhs()

static void ArcaneFemFunctions::BoundaryConditions::applyDirichletToRhs ( BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition *  bs,
const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView &  node_dof,
VariableDoFReal &  rhs_values 
)
inlinestatic

Applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS.

Updates the RHS vector to enforce Dirichlet conditions.

  • For RHS vector 𝐛, the Dirichlet DOF term is scaled by 𝑃.
Parameters
bsBoundary condition values.
node_dofDOF connectivity view.
node_coordNode coordinates.
rhs_valuesRHS values to update.

◆ applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs()

static void ArcaneFemFunctions::BoundaryConditions::applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs ( BC::IDirichletPointCondition *  bs,
const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView &  node_dof,
DoFLinearSystem &  m_linear_system,
VariableDoFReal &  rhs_values 
)
inlinestatic

Applies Point Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS and LHS.

Updates the LHS matrix and RHS vector to enforce the Dirichlet.

  • For LHS matrix 𝐀, the diagonal term for the Dirichlet DOF is set to 𝑃.
  • For RHS vector 𝐛, the Dirichlet DOF term is scaled by 𝑃.
Parameters
bsBoundary condition values.
node_dofDOF connectivity view.
node_coordNode coordinates.
m_linear_systemLinear system for LHS.
rhs_valuesRHS values to update.

VariableDoFReal &  rhs_values 
)
inlinestatic

Applies Point Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS.

Updates the RHS vector to enforce the Dirichlet.

  • For RHS vector 𝐛, the Dirichlet DOF term is scaled by 𝑃.
Parameters
bsBoundary condition values.
node_dofDOF connectivity view.
node_coordNode coordinates.
rhs_valuesRHS values to update.
